since_last: 60% of 99 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.21%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.54% · Gold -0.48% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 60% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.21%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.21%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +3.80%
cards.body: Leaders: META +3.80%, PATH +2.54%, NOW +2.41%, UEC +2.34%, BABA +2.04%. Laggards: KLAC -2.88%, AMAT -2.75%, TER -2.69%, INTC -2.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.63% at $151.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
